titleStmt.title: SII 39.115: original edition by K. Karuppiah
No. 115. (A.R. No. 115 of 1916.) TIRUKKĀḶAKKUḌI, TIRUPPATTUR TALUK, RAMNAD DISTRICT. SIVADHARMAPURIŚVARA TEMPLE-ON THE SAME WALL TRIBHUVAṈACHAKRAVARTIN KŌṈĒRIṈMAIKOṆḌĀṈ-28TH YEAR.

summary.p: Damaged. This inscription refers to the gift of land as Tirunāmattukkāṇi located in Peruṅkūṟṟakkuḍi alias Sundarapāṇḍyanallūr in Ollaiyūrkūṟṟam, a sub-division of Teṉkōnāḍu for supplying sacred food and awakening ceremony of the deity. The above gift was made for the expenses of the service called Ayyaṅgāṟaṉ sandi instituted by Kulaśekharadēvaṉ.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī tiripuvaṉac cakkaravattikaḷ koṉeriṉmai koṇ
ṭāṉ puṟamalaiṉāṭṭut tirukkoḷakkuṭi Uṭaiyār civataṉmiśva
ramuṭaiya ṉāyaṉār koyil tāṉattārkku Iṉṉāyaṉār tirup
paḷḷi Eḻucci Amuta ceytaruḷa ṉāyaṉār kulacekaratevaṉ kaṭṭi
ṉa Aiyyaṉaṅkakkāṟaṉ cantikku Amutupaṭi cāttuppaṭi Uḷ
ḷiṭṭu veṇṭum nittal nivantakaḷukkut teṉ koṉāṭṭu
Ollaiyūr kūṟṟattup peruṅkūṟṟakuṭiyāṉa cuntarapāṇ
ṭiya ṉallūrilp peruṉāṉ kellaikkuḷpaṭṭa nilattil
paḷḷiccantam paḻantevatāṉam nikki nikki Uḷḷa nilattil
teṉ koṉāṭṭu nāṭṭavar Iccivadharmmiśvaramuṭaiya nāyaṉār
kkuk kārāṇmai tirunāmattuk kāṇiyākat tanta nilam Irupa
Iṉṉāṭṭuk kāraiyūril nām vaitta Akaram
kulacekaraccaturvetimaṅkalattu brāmmaṇa
ram Iṉṉāyaṉārkku tevatāṉak kaṭamai Iṟuttu
�ka nilattukku cuntarapāṇṭiyaṉ kolāl
nilattukku māttāl Iṉṉāṭṭuk kālāl mukkalamāka vanta kaṭamai
yum Ivvūril nañceykkaṭamai Uṭal mutalāka Accil
Eccoṟu nikki Oru kūṟum Irupatteṭṭāvatu mutal
kaṭamai Antarāyam poṉvari yiṉavariyum vācalpeṟum
caṉaippeṟum veṭṭi pañcupili cantuvikka
ṭaiyarvari Iṉavari taṟiyiṟai cekkiṟai taṭṭolippā
Āyavaṟkam maṟṟum Epperppaṭṭa Iṟaikaḷun tavirttu
ḷḷum Uḻavum tavittu nam variyilār kaṇakkilum kaḻippatākac coṉ
ṉom Ippaṭikku Ivvolai piṭipāṭākak koṇṭu centirātittavarai
c celvatāka Ivvūr nāṉkellaiyilum tiruccūlattāpaṉa
mum paṇṇik kalliluñ cempilum veṭṭik koḷka Ivai
Irāyakuṭi Uṭaiyāṉ Eḻuttu Ivai kurukulattaraiyaṉ E
tu yāṇṭu 2 10 8vatu ṉāḷ 142 §
Digital edition of SII 39.115 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
